---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new page, section, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like added or changed?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Why is this useful?**
Explain the motivation or use case.

**Any design references or notes?**
(Optional) Screenshots, links, or descriptions of what it should look like.
